title: myriactis minuscula
intro: Myriactis minuscula, also known as the small myriactis or dwarf myriactis, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Myriactis minuscula include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and improve wound healing. Myriactis minuscula can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to create herbal teas and topical treatments.
